name: MBTI Guru Hermes
description: MBTI typing engine for conversation within the agent-onboarding meta-skill. Administers the full MBTI Guru test in conversation (A/B questions, scoring identical to the original, descriptions of all 16 types). 4 versions: Quick (70q), Standard (93q), Extended (144q), Professional (200q).

tools: Hermes Agent or similar AI coding tool
